svg.title: IdeaVault system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Shows the three service layers of IdeaVault: Next.js frontend, Fastify API with Redis and BullMQ, and the Python AI worker with Postgres and pgvector

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Next.js frontend do in IdeaVault?')
sendPrompt('What does the Fastify API layer handle?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Postgres in IdeaVault?')
sendPrompt('What does the Node enrichment worker do?')
sendPrompt('What does the Python AI worker do?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenTelemetry tracing work in IdeaVault?')
sendPrompt('How does Socket.io real-time work in IdeaVault?')
